---
title: "Create Dataset (v2)"
format: html
---

## Packages + helpers

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(peacesciencer)
library(odadata)
source(
  "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/milesdwilliams15/death-destruction-data/refs/heads/main/helpers/peacesciencer_extras.R"
)
```

## Create data

First, create the baseline country-year dataset.

```{r}
create_stateyears(
  subset_years = 1816:2014
) |>
  add_icd_mics() |>
  add_nmc() |>
  add_sdp_gdp() |>
  add_cow_majors() |>
  add_contiguity() -> dt
```

Next, get Kent's dissatisfaction data.

```{r}
read_rds(
      here::here(
        "03_data",
        "ken_final_measure.rds"
      ) 
    ) |>
      mutate(
        ccode = countrycode::countrycode(
          stateabb, "cowc", "cown"
        )
      )
```
